commit_scope: Add a Form-native channel loopback planner so cells can declare teacher/student feedback lanes plus resource expression floors, north stars, codecs, native protocols, capabilities, and fidelity signals.

local_validation.notes: Form proof passed with channel-loopback-band verdict 255 across Go/Rust/TS kernels; evidence validation passed in this branch.

phase_gate.gate: Cells can plan loopback teaching lanes and resource expression ladders over codecs and native protocols with explicit capabilities and fidelity receipts.
phase_gate.next: Use physical lane samples as receipts for loopback learning once native executor cells consume these plans directly.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form recipes can discover resource floors, north stars, and reciprocal or cross-modal cell teaching lanes.
test_flows: TTS to STT lowers to an audio sample stream loopback plan.
STT to TTS lowers to a token call loopback plan.
Video generation to classification lowers to a frame stream loopback plan.
Video classification to generation lowers to a feature vector call loopback plan.
Resource rows declare the floor, north star, and next receipt for each channel family.
e2e_validation.summary: Local Form validation passed: resource expression rows, reciprocal loopbacks, cross-modal video loopbacks, language forms, and capability refusal all proved in channel-loopback-band -> 255.
